data.revised_prompt:
Create one clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet for a fantasy RPG enemy. Canvas composition: exactly 2 rows by 2 columns, exactly 4 equal invisible cells, read left-to-right across rows. Solid chroma-key background only: flat #FF00FF magenta, no texture, no gradient, no floor, no shadow, no borders, no visible grid lines, no text.

Subject: normal style ranged enemy for Samsara Ascension, a corrupted xianxia spell archer. Narrow agile silhouette, dark teal and ash robe, small bow or talisman focus held close to the body, clean hand-painted 2D fantasy sprite, readable at small size, not cute, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art. Full body visible in every frame, three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, centered in each cell, same body height and same scale, subject fills about 58-66% of each cell with generous magenta margin. Stable anchored feet line when grounded.

Animation: idle cycle with real body pose changes across frames, not just scaling or glow. Frame 1 top-left: neutral ready posture, body settled. Frame 2 top-right: visible breathing or energy inhale, shoulders/core lift, small attached aura brightens. Frame 3 bottom-left: weight shifts to the opposite side, cloth/hair/petals/arms/weapon sway clearly. Frame 4 bottom-right: settle back toward the first pose, aura dims, loop returns naturally. Preserve exact identity, silhouette family, palette, face/eyes/core face, costume marks, weapon/focus, and material language in every cell; only pose, compact clothing motion, limbs, hair, petals, weapon angle, and small attached aura may change.

Containment: the entire subject and any weapon, horn, petal, hair, sleeve, tail, talisman, or tiny attached aura must fit fully inside each cell; nothing may cross a cell edge; no detached projectile, no impact burst, no large slash arc, no long trail, no dust cloud.

Style: clean HD hand-painted 2D fantasy RPG sprite sheet, crisp readable silhouette, subtle painterly shading, consistent lighting, no scene background elements.
